creator: unkadoug@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Sha Faisal from comment #13)
So that I can better understand what you mean by "with this patch reverted", can you provide a diff file showing the difference between the current vm_phys.c code and what you found to work?  I'm not sure whether you've undone only the changes made in that patch, or also undone some more recent changes.

If it was that patch only, then I'd expect that just removing these lines:
		/*
		 * If a previous segment led to a search using
		 * the same free lists as would this segment, then
		 * we've actually already searched within this
		 * too.  So skip it.
		 */
		if (seg->free_queues == queues)
			continue;
would fix the problem.
